description: GIVEN a user is playing an archive game

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber bar is displayed
steps.result:
THEN the game matchup is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND the away team is displayed to the left of the home team
AND the respective team logos are displayed (generic baseball image for non-MLB teams)
AND the respective team tri-codes are displayed
AND the selected broadcaster is displayed above the away team logo
AND the scrubber bar is blue on the left side of the playhead
AND there is a gradient behind the scrubber
AND the playback marker is at the current playback position during playback and pause
AND the user’s current playback position time is represented below the scrubber on the right hand side as currentTime/totalTime (H:MM:SS time format)
AND the closed captions button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
AND "Details" is displayed left justified, below the scrubber bar (DM5/MLB Experience only)
AND "Broadcast Options" is displayed to the right of "Details", below the scrubber bar (DM5/MLB Experience only)
